name: ultracode
description: Fan out Codex subprocess workers for deep code investigation, planning, and review: a declarative pipeline DAG, an imperative Workflow-script runner, pluggable transports (exec / app-server), warm-context resume, transient-error retry, budgets, and journaled resume.

interface.longDescription: Ultracode gives Codex a subprocess-backed workflow engine for parallel investigation, planning, verification, and edits. Workers can run read-only, workspace-write, or in an isolated git worktree, and are reachable three ways: the fixed-role / workers_spec fan-out, a declarative pipeline DAG, and an opt-in imperative Workflow-script runner. It adds budgets, journaled resume, adversarial verification, warm-context resume, transient-error retry with backoff, and a pluggable transport (exec or app-server). Worker results are returned to the parent thread for visible synthesis and implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use Ultracode to investigate this change
Run parallel Codex workers on this bug
